'''thalate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:babywise|babywise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-l-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:babywise|babywise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thalate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thalate|thalate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thalatesher|thalatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thalatesherĂ«m|thalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thalatero|thalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thalateshĂ«|thalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thalateshĂ«m|thalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithalatero|gokithalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithalateshĂ«|gokithalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithalateshĂ«m|gokithalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothalankerom|gothalankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothalankeshĂ«|gothalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothalankeshĂ«m|gothalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothalankeya|gothalankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thalaterom|thalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thalatemu|thalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thalateya|thalateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithalaterom|gokithalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithalatemu|gokithalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithalateya|gokithalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thalalate|thalalate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thalalatesher|thalalatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thalalatesherĂ«m|thalalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thalalatero|thalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thalalateshĂ«|thalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thalalateshĂ«m|thalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithalalatero|gokithalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithalalateshĂ«|gokithalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithalalateshĂ«m|gokithalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothalalankerom|gothalalankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothalalankeshĂ«|gothalalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothalalankeshĂ«m|gothalalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothalalankeya|gothalalankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thalalaterom|thalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thalalatemu|thalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thalalateya|thalalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithalalaterom|gokithalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithalalatemu|gokithalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithalalateya|gokithalalateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠlĂŠte|thĂŠlĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠlĂŠtesher|thĂŠlĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠlĂŠtero|thĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠlĂŠtero|gokithĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠlĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠlĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠlĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠlĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠlĂŠterom|thĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠlĂŠtemu|thĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠlĂŠteya|thĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠlĂŠterom|gokithĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠlĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠlĂŠteya|gokithĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thaflafte|thaflafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thaflaftesher|thaflaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thaflaftesherĂ«m|thaflaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thaflaftero|thaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thaflafteshĂ«|thaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thaflafteshĂ«m|thaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithaflaftero|gokithaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithaflafteshĂ«|gokithaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithaflafteshĂ«m|gokithaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothaflafnkerom|gothaflafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothaflafnkeshĂ«|gothaflafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothaflafnkeshĂ«m|gothaflafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothaflafnkeya|gothaflafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thaflafterom|thaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thaflaftemu|thaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thaflafteya|thaflafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithaflafterom|gokithaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithaflaftemu|gokithaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithaflafteya|gokithaflafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
